mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_info (device_id, alias, manufacturer, version_code, version_name, last_reported_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{alias}, #{manufacturer}, #{versionCode}, #{versionName}, #{lastReportedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE alias = #{alias}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, version_code = #{versionCode}, version_name = #{versionName}, last_reported_at = #{lastReportedAt}
mapper.select: SELECT device_id, alias, manufacturer, version_code, version_name, last_reported_at, last_heartbeat_at FROM device_info
mapper.update: UPDATE device_info SET last_heartbeat_at = #{lastHeartbeatAt} WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
